* Initial plan

* Add JWT and Cognito IDP SDK dependencies

Co-authored-by: agbishop <1376376+agbishop@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add Cognito User Pools (cognitoidp) mock service

Implements a mock AWS Cognito User Pools (IDP) service with:

- errors.go: Service-specific error sentinels (UserNotFoundException,
  NotAuthorizedException, UsernameExistsException, etc.)
- tokens.go: RSA-2048 JWT generation with JWKS endpoint support
  using github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5
- backend.go: In-memory backend with user pools, users, app clients.
  Supports CreateUserPool, SignUp, ConfirmSignUp, InitiateAuth,
  AdminInitiateAuth, AdminCreateUser, AdminSetUserPassword,
  AdminGetUser, and JWKS retrieval. Passwords hashed via bcrypt.
- handler.go: Echo HTTP handler for AWSCognitoIdentityProviderService.*
  X-Amz-Target dispatch plus GET /{poolId}/.well-known/jwks.json
- provider.go: service.Provider wiring backend and handler
- backend_test.go, handler_test.go: Parallel table-driven tests (86.5%)

commit.message:
fix: make chafa display images inside tmux (#109)

* fix: make chafa display images inside tmux

tmux 3.4+ advertises native sixel support, so chafa auto-selects sixel
mode. But the outer terminal (VS Code / xterm.js) can't render sixels,
producing gibberish instead of images.

Changes:
- Add chafa shim that forces --format=symbols inside tmux (respects
  explicit --format/-f if provided by the user)
- Enable allow-passthrough in tmux config for general graphics support
- Move ~/.local/bin to front of PATH in all shells (bash, zsh, fish)
  so shims intercept Homebrew binaries
- Re-prepend ~/.local/bin after brew shellenv which overrides PATH order

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update setup/shims/chafa

from GitHub, installs CascadiaCodeNF/CascadiaMonoNF fonts per-user via
the Windows Shell API, and configures Windows Terminal to use the Nerd

commit.message:
feat: comprehensive error handling & reconnection resilience

React Error Boundary (App.tsx):
- Class-based ErrorBoundary wraps entire app
- Shows friendly error UI with 'Return to Home' button
- Logs error + component stack to console

WebSocket Reconnection (useSerialConnection.ts):
- Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s delays
- Max 5 retry attempts before giving up with clear error message
- Added ws.onopen handler — resets retry count on success
- fetchWithTimeout wrapper (10s) for all API calls
- Runtime SensorData validation (isValidSensorPayload)
- Proper cleanup: nullify onclose before manual close to prevent phantom reconnects
- Strict boolean check for msg.connected

Server Resilience (server.js):
- Express error middleware (last middleware, catches all unhandled errors)
- ReadlineParser error handler (buffer overflow, encoding issues)
- broadcast() try-catch per client (prevents one bad client from crashing server)
- SerialPort error handler now cleans up references (serialPort = null)
- ws.on('error') handler for individual client errors
- process.on('uncaughtException') and 'unhandledRejection' handlers
- Graceful shutdown: notifies clients, drains WS, 5s force-exit fallback

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
